pages.text:
Ajay Anand <ajaysunil35@gmail.com>
TCS NQT for Priority Institutes Batch 2027| 7th July 2026
careers@mail.digialm.com <careers@mail.digialm.com>
30 June 2026 at 22:19
To: ajaysunil35@gmail.com
Dear Ajay k,
This is in reference to the TCS NQT for Priority Institutes Batch 2027 Exam, this is to inform you that online assessment
would be held on Tuesday, 7th July 2026.
Note- Please find attached the test specific instruction and request you to go through the details.
The credentials and the exam details are as follows :
User ID : CT20264966481
User Password : TAGP26057997
Candidate DOB : 09/01/2006
Examination Venue & Address : SRM Institute of Science & Technology,Kattankulathur SRM Nagar,
Kattankulathur,Chengalpattu District,Tamilnadu - 603203
Reporting Time : 12:30 PM
Gate Closure Time : 1:30 PM
Exam Time : 2:00 PM- 5:12 PM
Instructions To Be Strictly Followed:
1) Please ensure you carry the following documents with you to the Test Center, on the day of exam:
a) Printed copy of this email along with complete mail received from email and received To (Note- A copy of the physical
/ hard copy of this email is mandatory for admission into the examination venue).
b) Original Government issued Photo Identity proof for verification, such as Aadhaar Card / Driving License / Passport /
Voter ID / PAN Card only (NO digital copy).
c) ID card with incomplete Date of Birth (DOB) details will not be considered valid (Note: The ID card must have the
complete DOB details, including date, month, and year mentioned).
d) College ID card will not be considered as a valid ID proof.
2) Report to the test centre well before the gate closure time, otherwise entry will NOT be permitted.
3) Prohibited Items: No personal items, including jewellery, bags, mobile phones, or any other electronic gadgets such
as Smart watches, Digital Key, calculators, and other electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the examination hall.
There is no facility for safekeeping of your personal belongings outside the test hall and we are not responsible for any
loss / theft.
Only original Photo ID Card and printout of this email copy will be allowed inside the test hall.
4) Unfair Means: Adoption of any unfair means in the examination hall will result in disqualification from the TCS
selection process.
5) Friends and relatives accompanying the candidate will NOT be allowed inside the examination venue.
You will NOT be permitted to appear for the Exam if you fail to carry the Printout of this Email and the mandatory
Government issued Photo Identity Card.
Wishing you success!
This is system generated mail, please do not reply to it.
*****************************************************************************
Subject Specific Instructions_PNQT.pdf
318K
